data.title: HIKEit XS HXS-722 Throttle Response Controller Kia Hyundai Ford Plug & Play
data.description:
The HIKEit XS is a plug-and-play throttle response controller that reduces lag and sharpens acceleration feel on fly-by-wire vehicles. It connects inline with your car's OBD pedal harness — no tools, no cutting wires, no external power needed. Pairs with the free HIKE IT app (iOS and Android) via Bluetooth for full control from your phone.

I used this on a 2020 Kia Soul and it worked great. Removing it broke the small dashboard mounting clip, so that piece is missing. The controller itself, all harnesses, and all cables are present and fully functional. The missing clip doesn't affect operation — it only affects how the unit mounts to the dash.

Compatible Makes | Kia, Hyundai, Ford
Compatible Models | Kia Soul, Kia Sportage, Kia Stinger, Hyundai i30, Hyundai Kona, Hyundai Creta, Ford Fiesta, Ford Grand C-Max, Ford Territory
Part Number | HXS-722

Not sure if it fits your car? Visit hikeit.com, add your vehicle to the cart, and the model number will be shown — if it matches HXS-722, this unit is plug-and-play for your car.
Modes | 9 modes, 40 drive settings (app-adjustable)
Features | Auto IQ adaptive learning, anti-theft pedal lock, Bluetooth app control
Condition | Used, fully functional
Includes | Controller unit, all original harnesses and cables
Missing | Dashboard mounting clip (broken on removal)

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: Used, fully functional. All original harnesses and cables included. Dashboard mounting clip is missing — it broke during removal from a 2020 Kia Soul. Does not affect operation of the controller. No box.

data.category_note: Listed as CE due to eBay Inventory API requiring fitment table for Motors subcategories. Manually recategorized in Seller Hub post-listing.
